speaker: agent
text: Apex Health, this is Marcus. What can I do for you?

speaker: customer
text: Hey, I'm trying to find the closest dermatologist that takes my insurance.

speaker: agent
text: I can help with that. May I have your member ID?

speaker: agent
text: Thanks. Can you confirm the ZIP code you're searching from?

speaker: customer
text: 9-4-1-1-0, San Francisco.

speaker: agent
text: Got it. Let me pull up in-network dermatologists near you.

speaker: agent
text: Alright, the closest one is Bay Dermatology on Church Street, about half a mile away.

speaker: customer
text: Oh, that's really close, that's perfect.

speaker: agent
text: And they're in network on your Silver HMO plan.

speaker: customer
text: Do they have appointments soon, do you know?

speaker: agent
text: I can't see their live calendar, but their intake line is 4-1-5-5-5-5-0-1-8-8.

speaker: customer
text: Hold on, let me grab a pen.

speaker: customer
text: Okay, go ahead.

speaker: agent
text: Sure. 4-1-5, 5-5-5, 0-1-8-8. Bay Dermatology, Church Street.

speaker: customer
text: Got it. Do I need a referral for the HMO?

speaker: agent
text: You do. Your primary care doctor can send one over electronically, usually same day.

speaker: customer
text: Okay, I'll call my PCP first then.

speaker: agent
text: Sounds good. Anything else I can help you with today?

speaker: customer
text: Nope, that's it. Thanks, Marcus!

speaker: agent
text: Anytime. Take care!
